summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Speakupp website. All features working perfectly including turquoise theme, navigation, hero section with stats, video player, testimonials, pricing (₹199/₹299), contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Page loads successfully with turquoise theme
Header with Speakupp logo and complete navigation (Home, About, Classes, Pricing, Contact)
Hero section displays Sandhya's photo with correct stats (800+, 5000+, 7+)
Hero section has working CTA buttons (Join Zoom Class, Watch Introduction)
Video section with functional video player and controls
About section with Sandhya's bio and professional photo
Purpose section with 4 benefit cards (Build Confidence, Master Communication, Achieve Goals, Transform Life)
Classes section explaining Zoom classes with gallery images
Testimonials section with all 4 client reviews and star ratings
Pricing section with correct plans: Student Plan ₹199, Regular Plan ₹299
Contact section with correct phone (+91 9599 539864) and email (Speakupp3@gmail.com)
Contact form with all fields (name, email, message) working properly
Footer with speakupp.in domain and all social media links
All navigation links work correctly and scroll to proper sections
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
All interactive elements clickable (buttons, links, form submission)
Phone and email links have proper tel: and mailto: protocols
Social media links properly configured with target='_blank'
Video player has controls and proper poster image
Form validation and submission working with success alert
